title: フィクションを超えろ！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nine hundred ninety-eight! Nine hundred
ninety-nine!
choice_data_list: C'mon, show me what you got!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngggggh! HNNNNNGH! GYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intensity of today's training is completely off
the charts, and it's all because of a conversation
that got a little bit out of hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It started when Bamboo Memory and I got
sidetracked during a meeting about her training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No way! You've seen that show too? I watched it
with my dad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then you gotta know this line! "Throw
everything you got at me! I'll train until my sweat
runs dry!"
choice_data_list:
"Even if your sweat runs dry, your spirit never
will! Now go!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it! Man, their back-and-forths during
the training scenes were always so fiery!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a second! I just had a great idea! Why
don't we try doing the same thing during our
training sessions?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We can pretend we're actually the characters in
the show to really liven things up! I'll be the
disciple, of course!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I bet it'll be awesome! Can we give it a
shot? Pleeeaaase?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decided to make an extra-intense
training regimen where we keep motivation high
by throwing passionate lines back and forth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, we've reached the final exercise for the
day—shuttle runs from hell!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAH! HNNNNNGH! Th-this is rough!
choice_data_list:
"Do you think quitting will lead you to
victory?!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
N-no! Th-that's right! I... I swore I'd win! I made a
vow back in that valley!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH! Don't fail me now, muscles!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze! I did it! I finished all the exercises!
choice_data_list:
"Very good, young firecracker. That concludes
your training for today."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No way! That can't be it! I'm not ready to stop!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't you remember? In the show, the main
character kept training until they collapsed!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So that's what I've got to do too! No, that's not enough... I have to train even harder than that if I want to be like the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Trainer! This is where our story starts!
One that goes above and beyond the show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is appreciated, but she might
exhaust herself if she keeps going... Hm, what to
do?
choice_data_list: Follow your heart and keep going!

Weren't we going to reenact the post-training
meal scene, too?

Weren't we going to reenact the post-training
meal scene, too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is appreciated, but she might
exhaust herself if she keeps going... Hm, what to
do?
choice_data_list: Follow your heart and keep going!

Weren't we going to reenact the post-training
meal scene, too?

Weren't we going to reenact the post-training
meal scene, too?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let's put our heads together and
come up with an even tougher regimen than the
one in the show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we put together repeating sets of
sprints, bunny hops, leg lifts, and cossack squats,
followed by a run on the longest route around the
neighborhood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It still isn't enough for Bamboo Memory, though.
After some fervent begging, I end up sitting on a
tire for her to pull behind her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, now we're literally in this together! As
long as you keep shouting encouragement at me,
there's no way I'll fail!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Trainer! With our powers combined, we
can do ANYTHING!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Let's go! Let's GOOOOO!
choice_data_list:
You can do it, Bamboo! Show me what you're
made of!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! My limits don't EXIIIIIST!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incredibly enough, Bamboo Memory finishes the
training set before sunset on burning passion
alone!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant! I couldn't have kept this up without your nonstop encouragement!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That seriously felt like we had our own training
montage in a show starring the two of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks even more chipper than before we
started. It seems blasting past her limits helped
her make vast improvements!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Let's go! Let's GOOOOO!
choice_data_list: You can do it, Bamboo! I know you can!
You can do it, Bamboo! I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Lets... gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I-I made it! I thought... I was gonna die...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is completely out of breath, but
she still managed to overcome this incredible test
of endurance!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Let's go! Let's GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory tries to tough it out, but it
seems like she was already at her limit before we
started...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Mngh! M-my soul's... burning... out...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I was so close too! Urgh... Darn it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, she isn't able to finish the
regimen... Bamboo Memory is so exhausted, she
stumbles the whole way back to campus.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! That show's also famous for all
the great food scenes! Everything always looked
so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Remember the time they chowed down a huge
mountain of freshly-picked carrots?! Oh, and
there was always enough fried rice to feed an
army!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about it is making me hungry! Let
me go change real quick, and then let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That hit the spot! Thinking back on all those food
scenes got me so fired up, I couldn't stop eating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing like a delicious meal after a good
workout. Thoroughly nourished, Bamboo Memory
looks refreshed and energized.
